app.name: boss-agent-cli
app.one_liner: A CLI tool designed for AI Agents to interact with BOSS Zhipin (China's largest recruitment platform) with structured JSON output, 34 commands, and 4-tier login fallback.

screens.name: Main CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Execute core job search, communication, and AI optimization workflows via command-line interface.

rust_commands.name: ai analyze-jd
rust_commands.purpose: Analyze job description for key requirements and fit assessment.

rust_commands.name: ai chat-coach
rust_commands.purpose: Provide real-time communication guidance during recruiter chats.

rust_commands.name: ai interview-prep
rust_commands.purpose: Generate interview preparation materials based on job role.

rust_commands.name: ai optimize
rust_commands.purpose: Optimize job application materials for better match score.

rust_commands.name: ai polish
rust_commands.purpose: Polish user resume based on target job description.

rust_commands.name: apply
rust_commands.purpose: Apply to a job using security_id and job_id.

rust_commands.name: batch-greet
rust_commands.purpose: Send greetings to multiple recruiters in bulk.

rust_commands.name: chat
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve and manage chat records with recruiters.

rust_commands.name: chat-summary
rust_commands.purpose: Generate structured summary of chat conversation.

rust_commands.name: chatmsg
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch individual chat messages.

rust_commands.name: detail
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch detailed job posting information.

rust_commands.name: digest
rust_commands.purpose: Generate daily summary report of job search activity.

rust_commands.name: export
rust_commands.purpose: Export job or chat data in CSV/JSON/HTML/Markdown formats.

rust_commands.name: follow-up
rust_commands.purpose: Schedule and track follow-up actions on applications.

rust_commands.name: greet
rust_commands.purpose: Send a greeting message to a recruiter using security_id and job_id.

rust_commands.name: pipeline
rust_commands.purpose: Track job application pipeline status and follow-ups.

rust_commands.name: preset
rust_commands.purpose: Save and reuse search configurations.

rust_commands.name: recommend
rust_commands.purpose: Get personalized job recommendations.

rust_commands.name: search
rust_commands.purpose: Search jobs by keyword with city and welfare filters, automatically paginating and matching criteria.

rust_commands.name: shortlist
rust_commands.purpose: Manage shortlisted job opportunities.

rust_commands.name: watch
rust_commands.purpose: Monitor new job postings based on saved search criteria.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add structured JSON output for all commands
week 1: Implement core search and greet commands with welfare filtering
week 1: Set up browser automation with Patchright
week 2: Add export functionality for job data
week 2: Implement pipeline tracking and digest reporting
week 2: Integrate AI analysis commands (analyze-jd, polish)
week 3: Add batch operations and chat management
week 3: Build watch and preset systems for incremental monitoring
week 3: Enforce strict type checking across all commands
acceptance_tests: Agent can greet a recruiter using security_id and job_id without manual intervention.
AI analyze-jd command returns parsed requirements and compatibility score from a job description.
Daily digest command returns a structured summary of new applications and follow-ups.
Export command produces valid CSV and JSON files containing job search results.
User can search Golang jobs in Guangzhou with '双休,五险一金' welfare filter and receive paginated, structured results.
